text.title: Voice Agent Architecture and BasicVoiceAgent
text.summary: STT to LLM to TTS pipeline, latency budget per component, and BasicVoiceAgent implementation.

section.title: Pipeline Architecture
section.p: A voice agent chains three components sequentially: STT (Whisper) converts audio to text, an LLM generates a text response, and TTS converts the response back to audio. The pipeline is sequential — parallelizing STT and LLM is not possible.

rule.statement: Budget each pipeline component: STT under 300ms, LLM under 500ms, TTS under 200ms — targeting under 1000ms total end-to-end.
rule.rationale: The typical range is 650–1900ms. VAD adds 50–100ms. Total exceeding 2s feels unresponsive for interactive voice.

example.code: # Latency targets per component # VAD: 50-100ms → target <100ms # STT: 200-500ms → target <300ms # LLM: 300-1000ms→ target <500ms # TTS: 100-300ms → target <200ms # Total:650-1900ms→ target <1000ms

section.title: BasicVoiceAgent
section.p: BasicVoiceAgent records a fixed-duration audio clip, transcribes via Whisper, sends to GPT-4o, and plays back via TTS.

example.code:
class BasicVoiceAgent: def __init__(self, system_prompt: str = "You are a helpful assistant.", voice: str = "nova", sample_rate: int = 16000): self.conversation_history = [{"role": "system", "content": system_prompt}] self.voice = voice self.sample_rate = sample_rate
def listen(self, duration: float = 5.0) -> str: """Record and transcribe. Fixed-duration — use VAD in production.""" audio = sd.rec(int(duration * self.sample_rate), samplerate=self.sample_rate, channels=1, dtype='int16') sd.wait() # save to temp .wav → transcribe with whisper-1 ...
def think(self, user_input: str) -> str: self.conversation_history.append({"role": "user", "content": user_input}) response = client.chat.completions.create( model="gpt-4o", messages=self.conversation_history) msg = response.choices[0].message.content self.conversation_history.append({"role": "assistant", "content": msg}) return msg

antipattern.description: Using fixed-duration recording (sd.rec with a hardcoded duration).
antipattern.reason: Truncates long speech; records silence for short utterances. Always use VAD-based recording in production.

section.title: Tool-Enabled Voice Agent
section.p: Tool calls inside a voice turn must complete before TTS can begin. Long-running tools (web search, DB queries) should return a brief "thinking" audio response first.

antipattern.description: Awaiting tool calls synchronously in the voice loop without a "thinking" response.
antipattern.reason: Long-running tool calls stall TTS — the user hears silence for several seconds with no feedback.
